testsuite.name: GET /api/checkout/preferences/{id}

testcase.name: deve retornar 200 com a preferência pelo ID
deve retornar 404 quando preferência não existe
deve retornar 500 em caso de erro interno ao buscar preferência

testsuite.system-out:
08:59:02.917 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.marketplace.checkout.controller.CheckoutControllerTest$GetPreferences]: GetPreferences does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 08:59:02.930 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.marketplace.checkout.CheckoutApplication for test class com.marketplace.checkout.controller.CheckoutControllerTest$GetPreferences
